wikilink — basic
.
[[page]]
.
<p><a href="page" class="wikilink">page</a></p>
.

wikilink — with display text
.
[[page|custom text]]
.
<p><a href="page" class="wikilink">custom text</a></p>
.

wikilink — in surrounding text
.
see [[page]] for details
.
<p>see <a href="page" class="wikilink">page</a> for details</p>
.

wikilink — with spaces in target
.
[[my page]]
.
<p><a href="my page" class="wikilink">my page</a></p>
.

wikilink — with spaces and display text
.
[[my page|click here]]
.
<p><a href="my page" class="wikilink">click here</a></p>
.

wikilink — empty not a wikilink
.
[[]]
.
<p>[[]]</p>
.

wikilink — with path
.
[[folder/page]]
.
<p><a href="folder/page" class="wikilink">folder/page</a></p>
.

wikilink — with anchor
.
[[page#section]]
.
<p><a href="page#section" class="wikilink">page#section</a></p>
.

wikilink — with path and anchor
.
[[folder/page#section]]
.
<p><a href="folder/page#section" class="wikilink">folder/page#section</a></p>
.

wikilink — in emphasis
.
*[[page]]*
.
<p><em><a href="page" class="wikilink">page</a></em></p>
.

wikilink — in strong
.
**[[page]]**
.
<p><strong><a href="page" class="wikilink">page</a></strong></p>
.

wikilink — HTML escaping in href
.
[[a&b|c<d]]
.
<p><a href="a&amp;b" class="wikilink">c&lt;d</a></p>
.

wikilink — multiple on same line
.
[[page]] and [[other|link text]]
.
<p><a href="page" class="wikilink">page</a> and <a href="other" class="wikilink">link text</a></p>
.

wikilink — in heading
.
# Heading with [[link]]
.
<h1>Heading with <a href="link" class="wikilink">link</a></h1>
.

wikilink — in list item
.
- item [[link]]
.
<ul>
<li>item <a href="link" class="wikilink">link</a></li>
</ul>
.

wikilink — not in code span
.
`[[not parsed]]`
.
<p><code>[[not parsed]]</code></p>
.

wikilink — multiline rejected
.
[[multi
line]]
.
<p>[[multi
line]]</p>
.

wikilink — escaped opening bracket
.
\[[not a wikilink]]
.
<p>[[not a wikilink]]</p>
.

wikilink — single bracket not wikilink
.
[page]
.
<p>[page]</p>
.

wikilink — pipe with empty display
.
[[target|]]
.
<p><a href="target" class="wikilink"></a></p>
.

wikilink — pipe with empty href
.
[[|display]]
.
<p><a href="" class="wikilink">display</a></p>
.
